common.whyResult: Vim li cas txiaj ntsig no?
common.benefitsCliff: Saib koj cov kev pab tawg ntug
footer.tagline: Ib lub rooj vag sib raug zoo rau cov kev pab hauv zej zog. Peb pab koj to taub seb koj puas tsim nyog tau txais — peb tsis xa ib yam dabtsi pab koj li.
footer.finePrint: Aid Compass muab kev qhia dav dav xwb. Lub koom haum uas koj thov yuav txiav txim siab txog koj puas tsim nyog tau txais. Qhov no tsis yog lus qhia kev cai lij choj los yog nyiaj txiag.
footer.copyright: © {year} Aid Compass. Tsim los pab tib neeg, tsis yog ntawv xwb.
footer.privacyNote: Tsis xav tau SSN · Cov kev sib tham yuav raug tshem tawm hauv 2 teev
landing.hero.subtitle: Tham me ntsis. Peb xyuas cov cai tsim nyog tiag tiag — tsis yog kwv yees — thiab qhia seb cov kev pab twg haum, koj yuav tau txais li cas, thiab yuav ua li cas ntxiv.
landing.preview.title: Pib qhov uas koj xav tau kev pab
landing.preview.footer: Siv ib lub cuab yeej los yog txuas tag nrho plaub lub
landing.how.heading: Peb kauj ruam los ntawm tsis paub meej mus rau ib qho phiaj xwm.
landing.how.step1.title: Qhia me ntsis rau peb
landing.how.step1.body: Ib qho kev tham luv luv, phooj ywg — ib lo lus nug ib zaug. Tsis muaj npe, tsis muaj SSN, tsis muaj lus nyuaj.
landing.how.step2.title: Peb kuaj cov cai tiag
landing.how.step2.body: Ib lub tshuab txiav txim siab sib piv koj cov lus teb rau cov qib tseev raug luam tawm xyoo 2026 ntawm tsoom fwv thiab lub xeev.
landing.how.step3.title: Koj tau ib txoj kev npaj meej
landing.how.step3.body: Saib seb yam twg haum, vim li cas, koj yuav tau txais li cas, thiab cov ntaub ntawv twg yuav tsum coj tuaj.
landing.programs.heading: Cov kev pab cuam peb kuaj
landing.programs.subtitle: Rau lub kev pab cuam ntawm tsoom fwv thiab lub xeev hauv California, Texas, New York, Florida, thiab Illinois.
landing.trust.heading: Vim li cas neeg ntseeg Aid Compass
landing.trust.rules.title: Cov cai, tsis yog kev xav
landing.trust.rules.body: Ib lub tshuab txiav txim siab txiav txim seb koj tsim nyog tau txais los tsis tau. AI yeej tsis hloov txoj kev txiav txim.
landing.trust.sources.title: Cov qhov chaw raug cit
landing.trust.sources.body: Txhua txoj kev tshwm sim qhia nws qhov chaw raug, lub hauv paus kev cai lij choj, thiab cov ntaub ntawv tshiab npaum li cas.
landing.trust.private.title: Ntiag tug los ntawm kev tsim
landing.trust.private.body: Tsis muaj npe, tsis muaj SSN, tsis muaj xwm txheej nkag teb chaws. Koj lub sijhawm siv yuav tag hauv ob teev.
landing.trust.plain.title: Lus yooj yim
landing.trust.plain.body: Peb piav txhua txoj kev tshwm sim hauv cov lus meej, txhawb siab — hauv koj hom lus xaiv.
landing.trust.free.title: Dawb ib txwm
landing.trust.free.body: Aid Compass tsis them dab tsi thiab yeej tsis muag ib yam dab tsi rau koj. Tsuas yog kev coj qhia xwb.
landing.trust.time.title: Ob peb feeb xwb
landing.trust.time.body: Ib qho kev tham coj qhia, ib lo lus nug ib zaug. Feem ntau neeg tiav hauv li peb feeb.
landing.faq.kicker: Cov lus nug ib txwm muaj
landing.faq.heading: Zoo paub
landing.faq.q1: Puas yog daim ntawv thov raug cai?
landing.faq.a1: Tsis yog. Aid Compass pab koj to taub seb koj puas tsim nyog tau txais kev pab thiab qhia koj mus rau cov ntawv thov raug cai. Peb tsis ua ntawv thov dab tsi rau koj li.
landing.faq.q2: Puas yuav tsum muab kuv tus lej Social Security?
landing.faq.a2: Tsis yog. Cov lus nug coj tes taw yeej tsis nug koj lub npe, tus lej SSN, lossis chaw nyob tiag.
landing.faq.q3: Puas yog AI txiav txim siab seb kuv tsim nyog tau txais lossis tsis tau?
landing.faq.a3: Tsis yog. Kev tsim nyog tau txais los ntawm ib lub tshuab cai uas siv cov qib taw qhia rau xyoo 2026. AI tsuas pab piav qhia txog cov txiaj ntsig ua lus yooj yim xwb.
landing.faq.q4: Cov xeev twg thiab cov kev pab cuam twg raug suav nrog?
landing.faq.a4: Qhov tso tawm no suav nrog SNAP, Medicaid, CHIP, LIHEAP, WIC, thiab TANF hauv CA, TX, NY, FL, thiab IL.
landing.faq.q5: Puas muaj siv ua lwm hom lus?
landing.faq.a5: Muaj — xaiv koj hom lus ntawm lub npov nco-qis nyob rau sab saum toj. Tag nrho cov nqe lus thiab koj daim phiaj ua haujlwm raug txhais ua hom lus koj xaiv.
landing.cta.heading: Saib seb koj tsim nyog tau txais dabtsi hnub no.
landing.cta.subtitle: Dawb, ntiag tug, thiab tsuas siv ob peb feeb xwb.
program.snap.blurb: Nyiaj yuav khoom noj txhua hli rau ntawm ib daim npav rau cov tsev neeg muaj nyiaj tsawg.
program.medicaid.blurb: Kev pab kho mob dav dav dawb lossis tus nqi qis rau cov neeg laus.
program.wic.blurb: Kev pab zaub mov thiab txhim kho noj haus thaum suab plab thiab thaum menyuam me.
program.liheap.category: Kev siv hluav taws xob thiab dej
program.liheap.blurb: Kev pab them nqi cua sov thiab cua txias hauv tsev.
program.chip.category: Kev pab kho mob rau menyuam
program.chip.blurb: Kev pab kho mob tus nqi qis rau cov menyuam uas tshaj qib Medicaid.
program.tanf.blurb: Kev pab nyiaj ntsuab ib ntus rau cov tsev neeg muaj menyuam.

check.disclaimer: Kev tsim nyog tau txais kev pab yog txiav txim los ntawm lub tshuab cai tshwj xeeb, tsis yog AI. Yog cov lus qhia dav xwb — tsis yog lus qhia kev cai lij choj lossis nyiaj txiag.
check.guide.headingChecking: Tshuaj xyuas koj cov lus teb raws li cov cai xyoo 2026.
check.guide.heading: Ob peb lo lus nug, ces koj yuav tau lus teb tiag.
check.guide.body: Peb nug ib yam ib zaug, ces peb muab koj cov lus teb piv rau cov kab thib uas tsoomfwv tebchaws thiab lub xeev tau tshaj tawm — tsis kwv yees, tsis txiav txim.
check.guide.progressCollecting: Tab tom sau cov ntaub ntawv
check.guide.re1: Tsis xav tau lub npe, SSN, lossis xwm txheej txawv teb chaws — ib zaug li.
check.guide.re2: Lub tshuab tshwj xeeb txiav txim seb puas tsim nyog, tsis yog AI.
check.guide.re3: Feem ntau cov neeg tiav li peb feeb xwb.
check.guide.programs: Cov kev pab cuam peb tshuaj xyuas
check.checkingCard: Tshuaj xyuas koj cov lus teb raws li cov cai xyoo 2026…

check.ledger.viewFull: Saib txhua yam tshwm sim & phiaj xeem ua
check.msg.startError: Kuv muaj teeb meem pib tam sim no. Thov xyuas kom lub server tab tom khiav, ces rov qab tshiab sim dua.
check.msg.resultsReady: Koj cov tshwm sim npaj txhij lawm — nyob rau sab xis. Kuv teb tau lus nug txog txhua qhov kev pab cuam no: lawv pab dab tsi, cov ntaub ntawv koj yuav xav tau, lossis yuav thov li cas. Koj xav paub dab tsi?
check.msg.handoffError: Kuv tau sau koj cov ntaub ntawv tab sis tsis tiav tau kev tshuaj xyuas seb puas tsim nyog. Thov sim dua tsis ntev.
check.msg.intakeError: Thov txim, muaj qee yam tsis zoo. Koj puas tuaj yeem hais dua?
check.msg.learnError: Thov txim, kuv tsis teb tau qhov ntawd tam sim no. Thov sim dua.
results.heading: Raws li tej uas koj tau qhia, ntawm no yog tej uas peb nrhiav tau.

checklist.heading: Npaj rau {program}
checklist.intro: Kos cov no thaum koj sau lawv. Tsis muaj dab tsi raug khaws cia rau hauv ib tus account — daim ntawv no nyob hauv koj lub browser xwb.
checklist.extra1: Sau cov lus nug rau lub chaw lossis tus neeg ua haujlwm
checklist.extra2: Khaws lossis luam daim phiaj npaj no rau koj cov ntaub ntawv

cliff.heading: Koj cov kev pab yuav hloov li cas yog tias koj cov nyiaj tau los hloov?
cliff.intro: Qee zaus kev nce nyiaj hli tuaj yeem ua rau ib tsev neeg tau tsawg dua thoob plaws, vim qee cov kev pab poob sai dua li cov nyiaj tau los nce. Qhov poob ntawd hu ua kev pab poob nthav.
cliff.howToReadBody: Kab xim ntsuab tso ua ke koj cov nyiaj tau los txhua hli thiab tus nqi kwv yees ntawm koj cov kev pab. Kev poob txhais tau tias cov kev pab poob sai dua li cov nyiaj tau los nce — yog li tau nyiaj ntau me ntsis tuaj yeem ua rau koj tau tsawg dua ib ntus.
cloud.notReady: Kev khaws cia saum huab cua tseem tsis tau npaj txhij. Kuaj Supabase kev koom tes.
cloud.saveError: Koj cov ntaub ntawv tsis tau raug khaws cia. Thov sim dua.
cloud.saved: Koj cov ntaub ntawv uas tau tshuaj xyuas lawm raug khaws cia rau txhua lub cuab yeej.
cloud.deleteConfirm: Rho tawm lub cloud luam? Cov ntaub ntawv nyob rau hauv lub browser no tseem yuav muaj nyob.
cloud.deleteError: Lub cloud luam tsis tau raug rho tawm.
cloud.deleted: Lub cloud luam raug rho tawm lawm. Lub browser no cov ntaub ntawv hauv zos tsis tau hloov.
cloud.kickerOptional: Kev khaws cia hauv cloud (xaiv tau)
cloud.signedOutTitle: Khaws koj txoj kev npaj rau txhua lub cuab yeej.
cloud.signedOutBody: Nkag mus xwb yog tias koj xav kom Compass khaws koj cov ntaub ntawv uas tau tshuaj xyuas lawm. Cov cuab yeej tsis paub tus neeg tseem muaj peev xwm siv tau tag nrho.

cloud.storedNote: Tsuas yog cov txiaj ntsig muab faib, cov ntsiab lus uas tau tshuaj xyuas, cov chaw tau khaws cia, thiab koj lub sijhawm keeb kwm xwb thiaj raug khaws cia.
cloud.replace: Hloov cloud nrog lub browser no
cloud.privacyNote: Cov ntaub ntawv qub uas tau upload thiab Google tokens yeej tsis raug khaws cia hauv Supabase.
ac.heading: Pib nrog txhua yam uas koj xav tias ceev faj tshaj.
ac.subtitle: Koj tsis tas yuav ua kev kuaj seb tsim nyog ua ntej. Nkag siab ib tsab ntawv, nrhiav kev pab nyob ze, los yog pib ib txoj kev npaj tam sim no—Compass txuas txhua qhov raws li koj mus.
ac.storedNote: Khaws tseg hauv lub browser no xwb thiab yuav raug tshem tawm thaum koj xaus kev siv.
ac.chooseHeading: Hnub no koj xav tau dab tsi?
ac.chooseSubtitle: Txhua lub cuab yeej ua hauj lwm tau ib leeg. Siv ntau lub yuav ua rau koj txoj kev npaj tseem ceeb dua.
ac.tool.eligibility.title: Tshawb xyuas seb koj puas tsim nyog tau txais
ac.tool.eligibility.body: Ib zaj tham luv luv txheeb xyuas cov cai kev pab cuam thiab piav qhia txhua qho tshwm sim.
ac.tool.documents.title: Ua kom to taub ib tsab ntawv lossis cov ntaub ntawv
ac.tool.documents.body: Upload ib tsab ntawv ceeb toom, ntawv hli, lossis nqi hluav taws xob. Compass nrhiav cov hnub tseem ceeb, cov ntsiab lus pab tau, thiab cov ntaub ntawv tseem tsis tau muaj.
ac.tool.documents.action: Tshuaj xyuas ib daim ntaub ntawv
ac.tool.resources.title: Nrhiav kev pab ze koj
ac.tool.resources.body: Nrhiav cov chaw sau npe, tsev kho mob, kev pab zaub mov, thiab kev pab nqi hluav taws xob siv ZIP code xwb.
ac.tool.resources.action: Tshawb kev pab ze ntawm no
ac.tool.timeline.title: Hloov cov kauj ruam tom ntej ua ib txoj kev npaj
ac.tool.timeline.body: Khaws cov hnub kawg, cov ntaub ntawv, cov teem sijhawm, thiab cov kev raws qab ua ke, ces ntxiv rau koj lub calendar.
ac.suggestedKicker: Kauj ruam tom ntej pom zoo
ac.suggest.titleResults: Coj koj cov txiaj ntsig los ua ib txoj kev npaj tiag.
ac.suggest.titleNoResults: Qhia rau Compass paub seb yam twg tseem ceeb tshaj.
ac.suggest.bodyResults: Koj cov txiaj ntsig tshuaj xyuas tau npaj tiav lawm. Ntxiv ib daim ntawv lossis qhov chaw ze ze kom ua cov kauj ruam tom ntej tau tseeb.
ac.suggest.bodyNoResults: Yog tias koj muaj ib tsab ntawv nrog hnub kawg, pib ntawm ntawd. Yog tsis muaj, kev tshuaj xyuas cov kev pab siv li peb feeb xwb.
